name: noisemaker-godot-tools
description: Offline tooling for the noisemaker-godot port. These scripts import the unchanged JS Noisemaker reference compiler (shaders/src/index.js) to (a) export GOLDEN render-graph JSON from DSL (export-graph.mjs) and (b) regenerate effect-definition JSON (convert-definitions.mjs). No build step is required; the reference is plain browser-compatible ESM run under Node only for tooling. Set NM_REFERENCE_ROOT to a checkout of the Noisemaker reference repo — this repo does NOT assume a sibling checkout.
